targets.expr: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assets.assets WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT lifecycle_state, COUNT(*) FROM assets.assets WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY 1
SELECT at.category, COUNT(*) FROM assets.assets a JOIN assets.asset_types at ON a.type_id=at.id WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY 1
SELECT date_trunc('day',created_at), COUNT(*) FROM assets.assets WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assets.collection_agents WHERE status='online'
